_comment: Dream Studio Upscaler config. Edit this file and run `make ui-reload` to apply. Anything missing falls back to the built-in defaults in index.html.

styles.name: Photoreal detail
styles.prompt: photoreal, detailed skin texture, sharp focus, natural pores, 35mm film grain
styles.negative: blurry, low quality, plastic skin, oversharpened, jpeg artifacts

styles.name: Clean illustration
styles.prompt: clean linework, vibrant colors, detailed background, crisp edges

styles.name: Subtle restore
styles.prompt: preserve original details, photoreal, sharp focus
